titleStmt.title: SII 10.536: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 536. (A.R. No. 329 of 1905.) ON A BROKEN SLAB LYING IN THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE CALLED MOBBUDĒVALAM NEAR UPPARAPALLI, PRODDATUR TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT. Undated.

summary.p: States that Pratāpa-Rudradēva appointed his son Juṭṭaya's servant (leṅka) Gōṅkaya-Reḍḍi to govern Khaṇḍikōṭa (Gaṇḍikōṭa) and the Mulikināṇḍu country and that, while so governing, the Reḍḍi gave away the village of Khaṇḍikōṭa (?) rent free to the residents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
dala
guṇagaṇa
yanmahīṁ sa¨rvvāmmama
vamaharājō dha¨rmmasā¨rddhaṁ vyava¨rddhata
dhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaramakuṭama
rīciraṁjitapādāraviṁdayugaḷa cavuśaṣṭikaḷākuśala mū
ṟurāyajagadaḷa pratipakṣarāyavaṁśani¨rmmūlana
rāyasthāpanācā¨ryya mērumaṁddaradhai¨ryya calma
¨rttigaṁḍa kadanaprachaṁḍḍa Oḍḍeyarāyadiśāpaṭṭa sēva
ṇathaṭṭu vibhāḷa Anumakoṁḍapuravarādhīśvara vīralakṣmīni
jēśvara śrīsvayaṁbhudēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārā
dhaka parabalasādhaka nāmādisamastapraśastisahi
taṁ śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara kākatiyyapratā
parudradēvamahārājulu sukhasaṁgatāvinōdaṁ
bula rājyaṁbu cēyucuṁḍa khaṁḍikōṭakū
nu mulikināṁṭi dēśamulakūnu tana priya
kumārula juṭṭayaleṁka gōṁkayareḍḍiṁgāriṁ
ni rājyābhiṣiktulaṁ jēśe . tasya rudramahīpasya ju
ṭṭayō guṇaśālinaḥ . yathā kumārō rudrasya
kumāraśśakta raṁ sudhiḥ . rājani tasmin sati

grāmā
hājanālaku khaṁḍḍikō
yūrunu sa¨rvvamānyamugānu
¨rvvakamugā paripāliṁcenu . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī
svasti samastapratidvaṁdvisāmaṁtasīmaṁtinīni
ttasiṁduranirāmēṇa Abhirāmēṇa balavadaripa
kṣakṣayakālarudrēṇa birudaṁkarudrēṇa prabala
taravairinaravāraṇanivahanidhanadō¨rddaṁḍamaṁḍa
ḷakhaḍgābhirāmēṇa pratijñāparaśurāmēṇa pra
dhitapṛthvīpatinikaramū¨rcchadaraṇyatripuradahana dha
triṇa kulatta digvilāsinī
karṇapūrakī¨rttipallavēna mallidēvapratimallēna
janūjamānōjvalapratāpānala
mānāyamāna vairivīravilāsinī
tāpasōṣma dī¨rghaśvāsa paritapyamāna prapanna
divyavispaṣṭakā¨ryyakalāpaśaṁkitabrahmarā
kṣasēna birudabrahmarākṣasēna nasthāpi (incomplete )
Digital edition of SII 10.536 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
